description: pdfminer.six is a community-maintained fork of pdfminer. Extracts text from PDF files.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/pdfminer.six && python3 pdfminer.six.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/pdfminer.six && python3 pdfminer.six.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/pdfminer.six && python3 pdfminer.six.py --help`. PDF text extraction.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the osint category. Fits when the engagement needs: PDF text extraction.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: PDF text extraction.

name: pdfminer.six

trust.notes: Operator-curated Python library. The pip name is resolved from PyPI; the import name is verified against the registry.

use_cases: Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
